feed.title: SAP Community - Settlement Management
feed.subtitle: Settlement Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Open items check at settelment document creation
entry.content: We have a business requirement: when running settlement for condition contracts, the system should check customer open items. If there are any due invoices, the system should not allow the creation of the settlement document.

entry.title: No calculation quantity and net value in condition contract
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

i created a condition contract but i don't display quantity, net amount and other value.

Can you help me?

Thank you.

entry.title: TECO status
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

1. Please tell me the sequence of settlement scenarios for the capital project.

2. After TECO status, is a good issue possible or not?

I checked the system status (BS23). Good movement is allowed, but when i create good issue against reservation I face some issues.

Please Find attached Screenshots.

entry.title: How to replace expired condition contract with an active condition contract?
entry.content: I wanted to address a recurring issue that our business team has encountered regarding returns credit note and their impact on our System. At times, our business team creates return orders against the billing documents that were generated at least two years ago. In these cases, the System automatically determines the expired condition contracts from the original billing documents to the newly created return order and subsequently to return credit note. Also, as these return credit notes gets settled in the previous month under the new condition contracts (using t-code: WB2R_SC), we have been observing a discrepancy. Requesting you to let us know, if there is any BAdI or a User Exit that we can make use of to resolve this issue.

entry.title: External Commission Settlement of Invoices created directly from sales orders prior to delivery
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

        We want to use condition contracts for payment of external commissions using condition contract technique to dealers. Business requirement mandates that no settlement should be done (accrual or actual payment) unless a delivery has been created. For sales from stock products we do not have an issue as billing always takes place post delivery. But for custom make to orders, we have order related billing and billing document is created much ahead of the delivery. However, since condition contract settlement gets triggered by billing, system doesnt check if the delivery for the custom order has been made or not. Is there any way to achieve this technically? I have looked for a BADI under Settlement process which allows us to cancel the settlement run for an entire contract if one of the invoices in the business volume is found to be without any delivery. But customer doesnt want this to happen- we need to skip only that particular invoice and settle the commissions for the remaining invoices where delivery has been made for the custom orders.

Please share your opinion on how we can achieve this - specifically, if there is any BADI which allows us the scope to remove the invoices (without delivery) from the business volume for calculating the settlement amount.

Thanks

Anustup Chakrabarti

entry.title: how to settle unsettled project line items of previous closed financial year
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have an issue in SAP S/4 Hana. I found line items of a project were not settled in a prior period and financial year that is now closed (P12 FY2023).

I cannot run settlement for the current period (P7 FY2024) because the prior period P12 FY2023 is not settled. The unsettled period is already closed (Dec) and the year (2023) is closed as well. Obviously I cannot reopen  the year/period. Is there a work around to get those line items settled?

The error message I get when trying to run the settlement in the current period is;

"First Settle items from the previous year in the previous year"

Can anyone help me to advise what should I do to settle the unsettled line items of P12 FY2023?

Thank you and appreciate for your helps

entry.title: Transfer Business volume total quantity in Business Volume Criteria
entry.content:
In the case of Multi Payee Condition Contract (0S02), the requirement is to determine the scale for the settlement condition type based on the Total Business quantity for all the customers maintained in the Business volume criteria in the condition contract. However, the settlement calculation will be done on the basis of individual customer business volume quantity.

In this case, only the scales need to be determined based on the total business volume quantity.

In the business volume profile, the option to Transfer Business volume total quantity is available. How can we use this to transfer the total quantity for all the settlement documents and use this for scales determination?

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: CCM - Settlement document with negative and positive values
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a condition contract with various items, and a few have only returns, resulting in negative values in the generated settlement. Consequently, the document contains both negative and positive values. I have already set "6 - Change document type always" on document type 0S12 under "Handle negative amount." However, this only changes if the entire document is negative.

What we need is for the document to be split into two documents: one debit and one credit (0S12 and 0S16).

This is necessary because we send this document to e-billing, and the government validates the file, which cannot contain any negative values.

I have also tried the following:

WLFA > Settlement management > Condition Contract Management > Condition Contract Settlement > Define and Configure Profiles for Business Volume Determination > Split criteria.

I added the field SHKZG target ITEMCAT, but it did not perform the split.

Does anyone know how to achieve this split?

Best regards.

entry.title: Split Settlement documents based on one Condition Contract Management
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I have a customer requirement where they want create unique condition contract - sales rebates ... in this condition contract they want insert 2  pricing conditions.

Condition Type 1 : RES1 with calcuation rule Quantity. 

Condition Type 2 : ZRE1 (copy from ZRE1)  - with fix amount and Scales.

the main requiriment is in the settlement process due they want split settlement documents based on this pricing conditions, that´s mean, one settlement document with condition RES1 and other one with ZRE1 condition.

I have explored the split criteria in header level , however in the bussines volume table does not exist pricing condition type field.

anybody know how I can achieve this requirement? 

thanks in advance and appreciate any comment.

Jorge Celis

entry.title: Scaled rebate tier with exclusion on payout
entry.content:
Hi community!

We are setting up customer rebates and have come across a scenario where we need some advice...

The agreement with the customer is that their rebate scales are based on the Total Sales: 

£0 - £1m = 0%

£1m - £2m = 1%

£2m + = 2%

However, once you determine the scale they have hit you have to exclude all of the sales for materials that are in the group 'Boilers'.

So, if the customers total sales were £1.5 million they would have hit the 1% scale. If £0.5 million of those sales were for Boilers then the rebate payout would be (£1.5m - £0.5m) = £1m x 1% = £10,000

How would we set this up in CCM?

entry.title: Purchasing Rebate Processing (2R7) for multiple company codes
entry.content:
Dear all,

in our scenario, we have one supplier who delivers to multiple company codes of our group. 

With this supplier, we have a bonus agreement based on the total annual spend of all company codes.

Business volume determination for the whole group is easy with CCM but I need as well a settlement document for each buying company code. The standard behavior is that I get only one settlement document for the contract issuing company code.

If you have such a scenario, how have you solved this?

Thanks

entry.title: How do we see the amount which would be settled for a condition contract
entry.content:
After creating a condition contract , how can we see the amount which would be settled?

Is there an App for the same. In the business volume app, we can see the business volume but we cannot see the expected amount which would be settled.

Example 1000 is the Business Volume but Rebate of 5 % is 50 $. Where can we see this amount of 5 $

entry.title: Changing settlement receiver
entry.content:
Hello,

we have this issue-work order was created with WBS element "A". After that WBS element was changed to WBS"B". Now when you open WO ->Settlement rule first time in column Settlement receiver is WBS"A", go out and back to settlement rule and in column settlement receiver is WBS"B".  

first attempt second attempt

entry.title: Billbacks Handling via Settlement Management
entry.content:
Hi - How to handle bill backs in S4HANA Settlement Management? Do we create a Purchase Rebates to handle this? How to handle the incoming claims?

Reg

Siva

entry.title: Production Order Settlement Error
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We want to settle production order costs in 8th period. However, we did not make a settlement in the 7th period (it was a mistake).

The system does not allow settlement in  8th period, we faced that error "Balance of order 700000 must be settled for the previous period 007 first"

The 7th period is closed. How can we pass this error? I want to settle only 8th period now, not 7.

 

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: CCM - Settlement date after contract end date
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

Is it possible to add manual settlement date after contract end date? 

Example.  Contract Period 01.01.2024 to 15.03.2024, Final settlement done on 15.03.2024 but still want to another settlement on 20.04.2024

Currently, I am getting an error. Error msg no WB2R E 029 & WB2R E 199.

Any solution for this issue?

entry.title: Profit center in settlement document in CCM
entry.content:
Hello All,

I have a query regarding profit center in settlement documents.

When we create a Customer Invoice in intercompany scenario, profit center does not get populated in the invoice (VBRP-PRCTR). It is blank. The line items will not have the profit center from the material.

Since profit center is blank in customer invoice, settlement documents will have dummy profit center or blank profit center. Expectation is to have profit center same as the one in material.

The scenario works fine for standard O2C flow.

Any help/inputs regarding this would be very helpful.

Regards

entry.title: CCM - Copy Multiple Contract at a time
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I have two questions.

1. I know there is a copy option for coping 1 to 1 contract. But is there any option in CCM apps or any program for coping multiple contracts at a time? If yes, then let me the SAP S4 Hana version also.

2. Is there any SAP standard report for CCM where I can see contract wise settlement and other details.

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

entry.title: HCM - PA30 & PA40 Automation / CCM Workflow
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

HCM Integration is Active. BP BUPA sync also active. Employee also created through Maintain Employee app. But personnel no not created for all employees. As a result, we are unable to create teams & responsibility.

I found two programs SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_FROM_EMPL & SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_EMPL_SINGLE

After running these programs, only those employees for which personnel no already available showing in list and we can create team.

But there is a problem, employee id showing twice in the list and also how can I create personnel no automatically without using PA30 & PA40

Thanks,

Arindam Sur

entry.title: Authorization for Run Settlement
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

I met an authorization issue about run settlement. Why finance receive a error said she had no authorization for company code asset class. Where can I find the relevant documents? and which other roles does she need?
